string-array.name: whats_new_items
string-array.item: Recycle Bin: browse and restore items the system moved to trash
Hidden caches: clear shadow folders that popular apps keep under Android/media
App Vault: biometric-locked encrypted sandbox for sensitive files (Pro)
Battery alarms: get notified at custom low/full thresholds (Pro)
App Insights: 7-day screen-time chart, recent installs and apps without a launcher (Pro)
Battery screen now shows live current draw (mA) where supported
